results.title: Alex Mwakideu Raises Concern Over Kenyans Unaware of Their HIV Status
results.description: Media personality Alex Mwakideu has called attention to the number of people living with HIV who are still unaware of their status, stressing the importance of regular testing and knowing one’s health condition.
